title: Motschen's Better Leaves ADD-on
description: Makes leaves bushier while being compatible with texturepacks! Motschen's Better Leaves ADD-on.
body:
This resourcepack is an addon for the original «[Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves/version/7.1)» resourcepack. This resourcepack was made for additional mod support! Better leaves adds additional layers to leaf blocks, making them appear more bushy and natural.


This resourcepack adds no textures, making it compatible with allmost all texturepacks and mods out of the box (the textures adjust dynamically)


I strongly recommend you to enable the Smart Leaves option in [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or install the [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) mod, to get more FPS.

Make sure the textures packs are in the right order shown by the image below:
![!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2420408d4361d21a5a6b313cb934b06eb66a94ab.png)

This resourcepack supports the following mods:
Aurora's Decorations, [Let's Do] Beachparty, BetterDefaultBiomes, BetterEnd, BetterEnd (Forge), BetterNether, Biome Makeover, Biomes O' Plenty, Bloomful, Oh The Biomes You'll Go, Croptopia, Deeper and Darker, Druidcraft, Dungeons Mod, Environmental, Forbidden and Arcanus, Integrated Dynamics, Luminiferou, Uplands, Mubble, Nether's Exoticism, End's Phantasm, Quark, Regions Unexplored, Sn0wfrog's Capybaras, Swamp Expansion, Tech Reborn, Terrestria, The Aether, Traverse, The Undergarden, Upgrade Aquatic, [Let's Do] Vinery, Woods and Mires
